events.text: Dorothy Anderson, 62-year-old Black female, Former smoker (quit 10 years ago). Lives independently. ECOG performance status 1.

Diagnosed with Clear cell renal cell carcinoma, Fuhrman grade 3 of the Right kidney. Clinical staging: T3bN0M1, AJCC Stage IV. ICD-10: C64.9. Stage IV clear cell renal cell carcinoma with lung metastases.
MRI abdomen with contrast performed for baseline staging.
Pathology specimen received for initial biopsy.
Clinical visit for initial oncology consultation.
NGS report received for molecular profiling.
Underwent cytoreductive nephrectomy: Right radical nephrectomy with adrenalectomy. Estimated blood loss 150 mL. Length of stay 5 days. Uncomplicated postoperative course.
Pathology specimen received for surgical pathology.
Clinical visit for postoperative follow-up.
Initiated first-line immunotherapy-TKI combination: Pembrolizumab 200 mg q3w + Axitinib 5 mg BID. Cycle 1. Patient tolerated treatment without immediate complications.
Developed grade 2 diarrhea. Managed with loperamide 4 mg then 2 mg after each loose stool. Stool studies negative.
Initiated first-line immunotherapy-TKI combination: Pembrolizumab 200 mg q3w + Axitinib 5 mg BID. Cycle 2. Patient tolerated treatment without immediate complications.
Clinical visit for cycle 2 assessment.
Developed grade 1 proteinuria. 24-hour urine protein 1.2 g. Monitoring continued. No dose modification needed.
Initiated first-line immunotherapy-TKI combination: Pembrolizumab 200 mg q3w + Axitinib 5 mg BID. Cycle 3. Patient tolerated treatment without immediate complications.
Initiated first-line immunotherapy-TKI combination: Pembrolizumab 200 mg q3w + Axitinib 5 mg BID. Cycle 4. Patient tolerated treatment without immediate complications.
Clinical visit for cycle 4 assessment.
Bone scan performed for restaging after first-line immunotherapy-TKI combination.
Clinical visit for results review after first-line immunotherapy-TKI combination.
Initiated alternative first-line TKI: Sunitinib 50 mg daily (4 weeks on, 2 weeks off). Patient tolerated treatment without immediate complications.
Clinical visit for follow-up on alternative first-line TKI.
Clinical visit for follow-up on alternative first-line TKI.
CT chest/abdomen/pelvis with contrast performed for restaging on alternative first-line TKI.
CT chest/abdomen/pelvis with contrast performed for surveillance imaging.
Clinical visit for surveillance follow-up.
Clinical visit for surveillance follow-up.
Clinical visit for surveillance follow-up.
MRI abdomen with contrast performed for surveillance imaging.
Clinical visit for surveillance follow-up.

documents.text:
MRI ABDOMEN WITH CONTRAST REPORT

Patient: Dorothy Anderson
MRN: patient_4820e3069fa7
Date of Study: 2022-12-13

CLINICAL INDICATION: Clear cell renal cell carcinoma, Fuhrman grade 3 of the right kidney. baseline staging.

COMPARISON: None available.

TECHNIQUE: MRI performed with and without IV gadolinium contrast, multiplanar multisequence technique.

FINDINGS:
Unremarkable examination.

IMPRESSION:
1. Right renal mass consistent with renal cell carcinoma. Pulmonary metastases.

Electronically signed by: Robert Chang, MD
Department of Radiology

PATHOLOGY REPORT

Patient: Dorothy Anderson
MRN: patient_4820e3069fa7
Specimen ID: S2022-81967
Date of Procedure: 2022-12-18
Date of Report: 2022-12-22

SPECIMEN: Right kidney, excision/biopsy

FINAL DIAGNOSIS:
Clear cell renal cell carcinoma, Fuhrman grade 3, well differentiated.
Greatest tumor dimension: 6.0 cm
Margins: Negative (closest margin 0.5 cm)
Lymphovascular invasion: Not identified
Perineural invasion: Not identified

IMMUNOHISTOCHEMISTRY:
PAX8: Positive
CA-IX: Positive (diffuse membranous)
CD10: Positive
CK7: Negative
Vimentin: Positive

GROSS DESCRIPTION:
Received fresh labeled "Dorothy Anderson - Right kidney" is a gray-white tissue fragment measuring 6.0 x 4.2 x 3.0 cm. The cut surface reveals a firm tan mass. Specimen entirely submitted in cassettes A1-A9.

MICROSCOPIC DESCRIPTION:
Sections show a well differentiated neoplasm composed of nests of atypical cells with scant cytoplasm and high nuclear-to-cytoplasmic ratio. Mitotic figures are frequent (12 per 10 HPF). No necrosis is identified. The surrounding stroma shows fibrosis.

Electronically signed by: Michael Torres, MD
Department of Pathology

INITIAL CONSULTATION - Medical Oncology

Patient: Dorothy Anderson
MRN: patient_4820e3069fa7
Date: 2022-12-19
Provider: Dr. Helen Park

CHIEF COMPLAINT: initial oncology consultation

HISTORY OF PRESENT ILLNESS:
Mr./Ms. Anderson is a 62-year-old female who presents for initial evaluation of newly diagnosed clear cell renal cell carcinoma, fuhrman grade 3 of the right kidney, IV. Diagnosis made following evaluation of progressive symptoms. Stage IV clear cell renal cell carcinoma with lung metastases. Pathology confirmed clear cell renal cell carcinoma, fuhrman grade 3. Molecular testing is pending. Patient reports progressive dyspnea and cough x 6 weeks.

PAST MEDICAL HISTORY:
- atrial fibrillation
- osteoarthritis

SURGICAL HISTORY:
- Appendectomy (age 25)

SOCIAL HISTORY:
- Former smoker (quit 5 years ago)
- Alcohol: No alcohol use
- Occupation: Accountant
- Lives with alone

FAMILY HISTORY:
- Sister with ovarian cancer at age 55.

ALLERGIES: Latex (contact dermatitis)

MEDICATIONS:
- Apixaban 5 mg BID

REVIEW OF SYSTEMS:
Positive for: insomnia, intermittent headaches, unintentional weight loss. Remainder of 14-point ROS reviewed and negative.

PHYSICAL EXAMINATION:
Vitals: BP 133/88, HR 75, RR 17, Temp 98.5F, SpO2 97% on RA, Wt 80.7 kg
General: Comfortable, thin-appearing, no acute distress.
HEENT: No scleral icterus. Oropharynx clear.
Neck: No thyromegaly. No lymphadenopathy.
Lungs: Clear to auscultation bilaterally.
CV: Regular rate and rhythm, no murmurs.
Abdomen: Soft, non-distended. Well-healed midline surgical scar.
Extremities: No edema. No cyanosis or clubbing.
Neuro: A&O x3, CN II-XII intact, no focal deficits.

LABORATORY RESULTS:
WBC 5.9, Hgb 14.8, Plt 233, Cr 1.15

IMAGING:
See separate imaging report.

ASSESSMENT AND PLAN:
62-year-old female with IV clear cell renal cell carcinoma, fuhrman grade 3 of the right kidney. initial oncology consultation.

1. Clear cell renal cell carcinoma, Fuhrman grade 3 of the right kidney, Stage IV
   - Reviewed pathology and imaging with patient and family
   - Recommend cytoreductive nephrectomy
   - Will discuss at multidisciplinary tumor board
   - Molecular profiling results pending
2. Supportive care
   - Nutrition consultation placed
   - Social work referral for psychosocial support
   - Peripheral access adequate
3. Follow-up in 1-2 weeks to initiate treatment

Electronically signed by: Carlos Mendez, MD
Medical Oncology

NEXT GENERATION SEQUENCING REPORT

Patient: Dorothy Anderson
MRN: patient_4820e3069fa7
Date of Report: 2022-12-30
Specimen: Right kidney (Resection)
Diagnosis: Clear cell renal cell carcinoma, Fuhrman grade 3
Panel: FoundationOne CDx (324 genes)

RESULTS SUMMARY:
Tumor Mutational Burden (TMB): 6.4 mutations/Mb (Low)
Microsatellite Status: MSS

CLINICALLY SIGNIFICANT GENOMIC ALTERATIONS:
  VHL p.L89P (c.266T>C) - Missense (Exon 1) [Clinically Significant]

ADDITIONAL PATHOGENIC ALTERATIONS:
  SETD2 p.R1740* - Nonsense (Exon 11)

VARIANTS OF UNCERTAIN SIGNIFICANCE:
  KDM5C p.A388T - VUS
  MTOR p.S2215Y - VUS

COPY NUMBER ALTERATIONS:
  No significant copy number alterations detected

FUSIONS:
  No pathogenic fusions detected.

THERAPY ASSOCIATIONS:
  - VHL mutation: Consistent with clear cell histology. HIF-pathway targeted therapies (TKIs) and immunotherapy combinations recommended.
  - BAP1 loss: Associated with more aggressive biology.

Note: This test was performed using hybrid capture-based next generation sequencing.
Sequencing depth: mean 619x coverage.
Tumor content: 35%.

Electronically signed by: Maria Santos, MD, PhD
Molecular Pathology Laboratory

PATHOLOGY REPORT

Patient: Dorothy Anderson
MRN: patient_4820e3069fa7
Specimen ID: S2023-74126
Date of Procedure: 2023-01-17
Date of Report: 2023-01-19

SPECIMEN: Right kidney, excision/biopsy

FINAL DIAGNOSIS:
Clear cell renal cell carcinoma, Fuhrman grade 3, poorly differentiated.
Greatest tumor dimension: 2.1 cm
Margins: Negative (closest margin 0.3 cm)
Lymphovascular invasion: Present
Perineural invasion: Present

IMMUNOHISTOCHEMISTRY:
PAX8: Positive
CA-IX: Positive (diffuse membranous)
CD10: Positive
CK7: Negative
Vimentin: Positive

GROSS DESCRIPTION:
Received fresh labeled "Dorothy Anderson - Right kidney" is a tan-white tissue fragment measuring 2.1 x 1.5 x 1.1 cm. The cut surface reveals a soft yellow-tan mass. Specimen entirely submitted in cassettes A1-A6.

MICROSCOPIC DESCRIPTION:
Sections show a poorly differentiated neoplasm composed of nests of atypical cells with abundant cytoplasm and irregular nuclear contours. Mitotic figures are frequent (12 per 10 HPF). No necrosis is identified. The surrounding stroma shows minimal reactive changes.

Electronically signed by: Sarah Chen, MD
Department of Pathology

CT CHEST/ABDOMEN/PELVIS WITH CONTRAST REPORT

Patient: Dorothy Anderson
MRN: patient_4820e3069fa7
Date of Study: 2023-09-03

CLINICAL INDICATION: Clear cell renal cell carcinoma, Fuhrman grade 3 of the right kidney. restaging on alternative first-line TKI.

COMPARISON: None available.

TECHNIQUE: Multidetector CT performed from skull base to iliac crest following administration of 100 mL Omnipaque 350 IV contrast.

FINDINGS:
LUNGS: Few pulmonary nodules, largest measuring 1.2 cm in the left lower lobe. Consistent with metastatic disease.

MEDIASTINUM: No significant lymphadenopathy. Heart size normal.

LIVER: Homogeneous attenuation. No focal lesions.

PANCREAS: Normal in size and attenuation. No pancreatic mass or ductal dilation.

KIDNEYS: Heterogeneously enhancing mass arising from the right kidney measuring 8.4 x 6.7 cm confined to the renal parenchyma.

PELVIS: No pelvic mass or lymphadenopathy. Bladder unremarkable.

BONES: No suspicious osseous lesions. Degenerative changes of the lumbar spine.

IMPRESSION:
1. Right renal mass consistent with renal cell carcinoma. Pulmonary metastases.

Electronically signed by: David Kim, MD
Department of Radiology

CT CHEST/ABDOMEN/PELVIS WITH CONTRAST REPORT

Patient: Dorothy Anderson
MRN: patient_4820e3069fa7
Date of Study: 2023-12-15

CLINICAL INDICATION: Clear cell renal cell carcinoma, Fuhrman grade 3 of the right kidney. surveillance imaging.

COMPARISON: Comparison made to prior study from approximately 2 months ago.

TECHNIQUE: Multidetector CT performed from skull base to iliac crest following administration of 100 mL Omnipaque 350 IV contrast.

FINDINGS:
LUNGS: Few pulmonary nodules, largest measuring 0.5 cm in the left upper lobe. Stable in size.

MEDIASTINUM: No significant lymphadenopathy. Heart size normal.

LIVER: Homogeneous attenuation. No focal lesions.

PANCREAS: Normal in size and attenuation. No pancreatic mass or ductal dilation.

KIDNEYS: Heterogeneously enhancing mass arising from the right kidney measuring 9.3 x 7.4 cm confined to the renal parenchyma.

PELVIS: No pelvic mass or lymphadenopathy. Bladder unremarkable.

BONES: No suspicious osseous lesions. Degenerative changes of the lumbar spine.

IMPRESSION:
1. Right renal mass consistent with renal cell carcinoma. Pulmonary metastases.
2. Overall assessment: Stable disease per RECIST 1.1.

Electronically signed by: David Kim, MD
Department of Radiology
